---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Shunsuke Tatsuno"
page-layout: full
lang: en
toc: false
---

:::{.index-hero}
:::{.index-hero-inner}

:::{.hero-name-ja}
Shunsuke Tatsuno
:::


:::{.hero-affil}
Ph.D. Student at Graduate School of Law, Hitotsubashi University
:::

[See my CV](cv.qmd){.btn .btn-hero .mt-3}

:::
:::

:::{.index-body}

:::{.profile-card}

:::{.profile-card-text}

:::{.section-label}
About
:::

I am a Ph.D. student in the Graduate School of Law at Hitotsubashi University, majoring in Internatinoal Relations. I am particularly interested in the choice and effects of violence and nonviolence in civil conflicts and social movements. I primary conduct empirical analyses using statistical methods. In my free time, I enjoy playing the violin.


:::{.interest-tags}
[IR theories]{.interest-tag}
[civil wars]{.interest-tag}
[Quantitative analysis]{.interest-tag}
[Sibelius]{.interest-tag}
:::

:::

:::{.profile-card-photo}
![](../assets/profile.JPG){.profile-photo-img}
:::

:::

:::{.index-grid}

:::{.index-col-side}

:::{.section-label}
Education
:::

:::{.edu-list}
| | |
|---|---|
| 2026 - Present | Ph.D. candidate, Graduate School of Law, Hitotsubashi University |
| 2024 - 2026    | Master's Program, Graduate School of Law, Hitotsubashi University |
| 2020 - 2024    | Faculty of Law, Hitotsubashi University |
:::

:::

:::{.index-col-side}

:::{.section-label}
Contact
:::

:::{.contact-email}
{{< fa envelope >}} jd261004 [at] g.hit-u.ac.jp
:::

[{{< fa brands github >}} GitHub](https://github.com/s-tatsuno){.social-link target="_blank"}

[{{< fa brands x-twitter >}} Twitter (X)](https://x.com/S1230Tats){.social-link target="_blank"}

:::{.blog-link-wrap}
[My blog in Japanese→](https://s-tatsuno.github.io/lab-desk/){.blog-link target="_blank"}
:::
:::
:::
:::
